title: Pillowy Russian Beef Dumplings
description: A spicy and pillowy Russian dish featuring golden syrup, perfect for a solo dinner, served in a scallop shell.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground beef, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
In a small bowl, whisk together beef broth and golden syrup.
Add the broth mixture to the beef mixture, mixing until just combined.
In a separate large bowl, whisk together flour and eggs to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk using a rolling pin.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, then remove with a slotted spoon.
Serve the dumplings in scallop shells, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F.
